name: htmldiff.js
when_to_use: 需要比较两段渲染态 HTML 并保留标签层级、用 ins/del 标出文案或合同条款变化时用它而非手写,因为原生字符串 diff 会切坏标签并丢失富文本语义。
why_valuable: AI 默认只能一次性猜写 ins/del,做不到对任意两段 HTML 在运行时稳定分词、对齐标签层级并复算语义差异;本库确定地产出可渲染 diff HTML。

data_in.note: 入口是两个完整 HTML 片段字符串,不是 DOM 节点或代码补丁;输出会复用输入 HTML,不可信输入须先按消费场景净化。

schema.before: string —— 原始 HTML 片段;空字符串合法
schema.after: string —— 变更后 HTML 片段;空字符串合法
schema.class_name?: string | null —— 附到每个 ins/del 的 class,默认 null(不附 class)
schema.data_prefix?: string | null —— operation-index 数据属性前缀,默认 null,即 data-operation-index
schema.atomic_tags?: string | null —— 逗号分隔且整段视为原子节点的标签名,默认 null;0.9.4 源码默认 iframe,object,math,svg,script,video,head,style,a

provides._note: headless-primitive:只计算字符串、不直接渲染,因此无 L 级和 carriers 矩阵。
provides.outputs: string —— 保留共同 HTML,差异文本或节点由 <ins>/<del> 包裹,并带 data-operation-index。

api_surface.diff: diff(before, after, className?, dataPrefix?, atomicTags?) → HTML string

peer.note: 消费者是能显示受信 HTML 的 DOM/富文本视图;若 before/after 来自用户输入,先净化再写入 innerHTML,本库不是 sanitizer。

en.when_to_use: Use it to compare two rendered HTML fragments while preserving tag hierarchy and marking wording or contract-clause changes with ins/del, instead of a handwritten string diff that breaks tags and loses rich-text semantics.
en.why_valuable: AI can only guess a one-off ins/del result; it cannot reliably tokenize arbitrary HTML at runtime, align tag hierarchy, and recompute semantic differences. This library deterministically returns renderable diff HTML.

data_in.note: The entry accepts two complete HTML fragment strings, not DOM nodes or a code patch. Output reuses input HTML, so sanitize untrusted input for the consuming context first.

schema.before: string -- original HTML fragment; empty string is valid
schema.after: string -- changed HTML fragment; empty string is valid
schema.class_name?: string | null -- class added to each ins/del; default null (no class)
schema.data_prefix?: string | null -- operation-index data-attribute prefix; default null, producing data-operation-index
schema.atomic_tags?: string | null -- comma-separated tags treated as indivisible nodes; default null; 0.9.4 source defaults to iframe,object,math,svg,script,video,head,style,a

boot.note: 保守使用包的单一默认函数;不在本条内渲染或绑定回调。jsDelivr +esm 已把 0.9.4 的 CommonJS 入口转换为 default export。

isolation.evidence: +esm scan: 0 `document.head`, 0 `document.body`, 0 createElement('style'), 0 addEventListener. Headless string-in/string-out HTML diff; touches no DOM. Consumer mounts the returned trusted HTML wherever it wants (including a shadow root).
